goal: Collect recent diabetes medical-device news from Phase 3 custom sources and CDP-recovered blocked sources.
hardConstraints: Do not mix this into medical-diabetes-news; keep a separate Phase 3 taskbook.
Use Node built-ins only; do not add dependencies.
Prevent concurrent runs of this task with a temp-directory lock so duplicate visible Chrome sessions are not launched.

Use sequential self-managed Chrome CDP sessions for Dexcom IR, Insulet IR, MassDevice, and best-effort MobiHealthNews because direct HTTP is blocked by Cloudflare, and clean each process tree before moving to the next source.
Do not scrape article detail pages; use listing/RSS metadata only.
Preserve official URLs, dates, source names, and titles in JSON.
Record source failures in sourceStatus instead of pretending they succeeded.
Cap requested windows at 30 days and trust dispatcher-provided startIso/endIso.
Do not emit Markdown, HTML, or localized report text; rendering and language selection belong to diabetes-news-report-renderer.
acceptance: Do not write diabetes_device_custom_source_news.md or diabetes_device_custom_source_news.html.
sourceStatus includes stable custom sources and CDP-recovered sources.

Dexcom IR, Insulet IR, and MassDevice are recovered through CDP and expose parseable listing items; per-source matched counts may be zero when the requested rolling window has no qualifying diabetes-device item.
MobiHealthNews is attempted through CDP with its Dexcom tag as the diabetes-device slice, but it is best-effort and must not fail the whole report when blocked.
Every result date is parseable and within the requested time window.
Every result URL uses an accepted official source domain.
forbidden: Do not use company names alone as inclusion criteria when the item text is not diabetes-device related.
Do not bypass Cloudflare/login/CAPTCHA; use visible CDP and user-assisted confirmation when needed.
Do not output Markdown or HTML.
Do not perform language localization in this collector.
context: Phase 3 plus Phase 4 from source-plan.md: handle custom parser sources and recover selected blocked official company sources with CDP. This task is a structured JSON collector only.
